originalTitle: Is the stock market closed today for Juneteenth? Will the post office deliver mail?
summary: The June 19 federal holiday falls on a Friday this year. Here’s how trading hours and other services are affected.
content: The June 19 federal holiday falls on a Friday this year. Here’s how trading hours and other services are affected.
chineseTitle: 今天股市因六月节休市吗？邮局会送邮件吗？
chineseSummary: 6 月 19 日联邦假日今年恰逢周五。以下是交易时间和其他服务受到的影响。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
